sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Is Agilent Technologies a Good Stock to Buy?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Agilent Technologies, Inc. (A) as a potential investment, drawing from a bullish thesis by Quality At A Fair Price. It highlights Agilent's strong market position and projected 13.44% forward annual return, driven by its current dividend yield, potential valuation reversion, and robust earnings growth. While dividend growth has slowed, the company's low payout ratio and consistent earnings expansion suggest long-term value creation.

feed.title: Lansing Street Advisors Acquires New Stake in BlackRock CORO ETF
feed.summary: Lansing Street Advisors has acquired a new stake in the BlackRock ETF Trust - iShares International Country Rotation Active ETF (NASDAQ:CORO), purchasing 233,608 shares valued at approximately $7.51 million in the first quarter of 2026. This acquisition represents 1.89% of their reportable assets under management and places CORO among their significant holdings, as the ETF has shown strong performance. The actively managed CORO fund provides global equity market exposure through a rules-based country rotation strategy, attracting both institutional and individual investors.

feed.title: SEC Form DEFA14A filed by Eledon Pharmaceuticals Inc.
feed.summary: Eledon Pharmaceuticals Inc. (ELDN) has filed an SEC Form DEFA14A. The article also provides recent analyst ratings for ELDN, including targets from H.C. Wainwright, Guggenheim, Cantor Fitzgerald, and HC Wainwright & Co., alongside a list of related SEC filings and press releases concerning the company.

feed.title: Epsium Enterprise appoints new CFO as Ming Yin Gordan Au Yeung resigns
feed.summary: Epsium Enterprise announced the resignation of its CFO, Ming Yin Gordan Au Yeung, due to personal reasons. Ching Wan Wong, with over 25 years of experience in finance and regulatory compliance, has been appointed as the new CFO. Wong's compensation will be $10,000 annually, and he will be indemnified for certain liabilities in his role.

feed.title: [Form 4] CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Celso L. White, a Director at CF Industries Holdings, Inc., received 1,390 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, as a non-cash equity award. This grant, valued at $0.00 per share, increased his direct holdings to 23,429.165 shares. The transaction was reported in a Form 4 filing, indicating neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: American Tower EVP Ruth Dowling sells $173,091 in stock
feed.summary: Ruth T. Dowling, EVP and Chief Administrative Officer at American Tower Corp, sold shares totaling $173,091 in two transactions on April 28 and April 29, 2026. These sales were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan and occurred while the stock was trading above its InvestingPro Fair Value. American Tower recently surpassed Q1 2026 analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue, leading to raised price targets from Truist Securities and BofA Securities.

feed.title: Shareholders at Digimarc (NASDAQ: DMRC) approve merger reorganization and elect full board
feed.summary: Digimarc (NASDAQ: DMRC) shareholders approved an Agreement and Plan of Reorganization, including a related merger agreement, during their annual meeting on April 30, 2026. They also elected all eight director nominees, ratified KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for 2026, and supported executive compensation through an advisory vote. A high quorum of 87% of outstanding shares was represented, ensuring the validity of the votes.

feed.title: CF Industries (NYSE: CF) director receives 1,390-share stock award and updates holdings
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. director Robert C. Arzbaecher reported receiving a stock award of 1,390 shares on April 28, 2026. This grant brought his direct holdings to 54,304 shares, with an additional 2,375 shares held indirectly through an IRA. The transaction was a compensation-related acquisition and not an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: 3,000 Flow Control Group workers to get cash in KKR-Neuberger deal
feed.summary: Flow Control Group (FCG), a North American network of technical flow control and industrial automation distributors, announced that KKR and Neuberger Private Markets have agreed to jointly acquire the company. KKR will retain a majority stake, while Neuberger will hold a significant minority interest. As part of this deal, more than 3,000 FCG employees will receive cash payouts due to KKR's existing broad-based ownership program, which KKR and Neuberger intend to re-establish post-closing.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.22 EPS
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $2.72 and revenue of $5.74 billion, an 11.9% increase year-over-year. The company also raised its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $11.40-$11.60, driven by significant momentum in its Missile Solutions and Space & Mission Systems segments, including a planned IPO for its Missile Solutions unit. Despite the positive results, the stock saw a slight downtick intraday as investors weighed guidance against expectations and valuation multiples.

feed.title: Director at Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) granted 3,436 stock units
feed.summary: Wells Fargo director Fabian T. Garcia was granted 3,436 Common Stock Units, valued at $81.50 per unit, as part of his compensation. These units, which represent the right to receive one share of Wells Fargo common stock, vested upon grant but settlement is deferred until his termination of service or an elected later date. Following this grant, Garcia holds 11,475.5109 Common Stock Units and 101.6353 direct shares of common stock, including amounts from a dividend reinvestment program.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Investors Win Class Status Despite Appellate Setback
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. investors suing over a bribery scandal have regained class status, eight months after an appeals court reversed an earlier certification. Despite the US Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit removing one of the legal bases for presumed reliance on company statements, a district court judge reaffirmed class status. The judge stated that an alternate legal standard still supports the presumption that investors relied on the alleged misstatements and omissions.

feed.title: Stryker beats The Street despite Q1 cyberattack, sticks with guidance
feed.summary: Stryker reported first-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations and maintained its full-year guidance, despite a cyberattack in early March that disrupted operations. The company's Q1 EPS was $2.60, 38¢ ahead of analyst estimates, with sales of $6.020 billion. Stryker also announced organizational changes and an agreement to acquire Amplitude Vascular Systems.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Completes $3 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: HCA Inc., a subsidiary of HCA Healthcare, has completed a $3 billion public offering of senior unsecured notes due 2031, 2033, and 2036. These notes are fully guaranteed by HCA Healthcare and include customary covenants, optional redemption features, and change-of-control repurchase rights, aiming to diversify the company's long-term funding and strengthen its financial position. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, maintains a "Neutral" rating for HCA stock due to resilient profitability and cash generation balanced against elevated balance-sheet risk and weak technical momentum.

feed.title: Pam Rollins (NYSE: ROL) gets $150K restricted stock grant, boosting direct holdings
feed.summary: Rollins director Pam R. Rollins received a restricted stock grant valued at $150,000, consisting of 2,692 shares of common stock that vested immediately. This award significantly increases her direct holdings to 480,263 shares, with an additional 94,053 shares held indirectly through a trust. The transaction was a compensation grant under the company’s 2018 Stock Incentive Plan, not a market purchase.

feed.title: Western Digital forecasts quarterly revenue above estimates on AI storage demand
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC.O) has forecasted quarterly revenue above Wall Street estimates, driven by strong demand for data storage from artificial intelligence companies which is fueling pricing power. Despite this positive outlook, the company's shares experienced a nearly 5% decline in extended trading. This demand-supply dynamic, especially since separating its flash memory business, has enabled significant pricing power and aggressive capital returns, including a new $4 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: Director Rollins (NYSE: ROL) awarded $150K restricted stock
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. director Timothy Curtis Rollins was granted 2,692 shares of restricted Common Stock, valued at $150,000, under the company’s 2018 Stock Incentive Plan. The award vests immediately, increasing his direct holdings to 385,502 shares, with additional indirect holdings through a trust and his spouse. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, detailing his updated beneficial ownership in the company.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (EHC) Encompass Health Corporation Reports Q1 Revenue $1.59B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.57B
feed.summary: Encompass Health Corporation (EHC) announced its Q1 revenue reached $1.59 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimated $1.57 billion. The company also posted adjusted EPS of $1.60 per share, exceeding analyst expectations of $1.49. This financial update, released on April 30, 2026, highlights a strong start to the year for the healthcare facilities and services provider.

feed.title: Equus Total Return (NYSE: EQS) outlines 2026 board elections and pay vote
feed.summary: Equus Total Return, Inc. (EQS) has announced its 2026 annual stockholder meeting on June 30, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of five directors and a non-binding advisory proposal for 2025 executive compensation. Key executive compensation figures for 2025 were detailed, including CEO John A. Hardy receiving $896,943 and the CEO pay ratio being approximately 2.42 times that of the median employee. The Board recommends voting "For" all director nominees and the say-on-pay proposal.

feed.title: New EPSIUM Enterprise (EPSM) CFO Ching Wan Wong appointed after predecessor resigns
feed.summary: EPSIUM Enterprise Limited announced that its CFO, Ming Yin Gordan Au Yeung, resigned on April 30, 2026, for personal reasons, with no disagreements cited. The company promptly appointed Ching Wan Wong as the new CFO, effective May 1, 2026. Wong brings over 25 years of experience in finance, accounting, and regulatory compliance, including previous CFO roles and extensive U.S. SEC and Hong Kong listing compliance work.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries Inc. (MHK) reported first-quarter earnings of $117.1 million, or $1.90 per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectation of $1.80 per share. However, the flooring manufacturer's revenue of $2.73 billion fell short of analysts' forecasts of $2.74 billion. The information was generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences Annual Meeting: Directors, Pay Win Big; Pipeline Launches and Acquisitions Highlighted
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences held its 2026 Annual Meeting where shareholders re-elected directors, ratified executive pay, and approved an equity incentive plan, while rejecting three shareholder proposals. The company highlighted strong 2025 performance with $20.8 billion in HIV sales, a 53-program clinical pipeline, and upcoming launches including bulevirtide and Trodelvy. Gilead also mentioned recent acquisitions and its capital return plan, which included $4 billion in dividends and $1.9 billion in stock repurchases, alongside initiatives to expand lenacapavir access globally.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CPT) Camden Property Trust Reports Q1 Revenue $388.8M, vs. FactSet Est of $378.1M
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) announced Q1 revenue of $388.8 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $378.1 million. The company's Q1 core FFO and revenue declined, and it provided Q2 FFO guidance in the range of $1.63 to $1.67. Recent analyst adjustments to price targets for Camden Property Trust reflect mixed outlooks, with some maintaining an Equalweight or Sector Perform rating, while others have a Sell or Buy rating.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] EMPIRE PETROLEUM CORP Definitive Proxy Statement
feed.summary: Empire Petroleum Corp. has filed a definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) for its annual stockholder meeting on June 17, 2026. Key proposals include the election of three directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation (say-on-pay), approval of a new 2026 Stock and Incentive Compensation Plan reserving 1.2 million shares, and ratification of Grant Thornton LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy details corporate governance practices, director independence, and executive compensation, emphasizing the company's commitment to strategic growth and stockholder value.

feed.title: WELLS FARGO & COMPANY/MN (NYSE: WFC) director gets 3,436 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company director Theodore F. Craver Jr. was granted 3,436 Common Stock Units on April 28, 2026, each valued at $81.50. These units, which represent a right to receive one share of Wells Fargo common stock and include reinvested dividend equivalents, vested immediately but will be settled after his service as a director concludes or on a later elected date. Following this award, Craver directly holds 17,851.9647 Common Stock Units, alongside indirect holdings through trusts.

feed.title: RBC Healthcare Conference to feature HCA on May 20 at 11:30 a.m. ET
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) is scheduled to present at the RBC Global Healthcare Conference on May 20, 2026, at 11:30 a.m. ET. A live audio webcast and related presentation materials will be available on the Investor Relations section of the company's website. HCA Healthcare is a leading provider of healthcare services with 189 hospitals and approximately 2,600 ambulatory sites across 19 states and the United Kingdom.

feed.title: $0.20 a share: Esquire Financial sets June 1 dividend payout
feed.summary: Esquire Financial Holdings (NASDAQ: ESQ) has announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company is a financial holding company headquartered in Jericho, New York, with its wholly-owned subsidiary, Esquire Bank, serving the litigation industry and small businesses.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 30th, 325.46K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.45 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 30th, there was significant options trading activity for the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ), with 325,460 contracts traded. This level of activity contributed to a total open interest of 1.45 million contracts. The article highlights these key metrics, indicating a notable level of investor engagement in TQQQ options.

feed.title: Director at Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) awarded 3,436 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company director Mark A. Chancy was granted 3,436 Common Stock Units, valued at $81.50 per unit, with settlement deferred until his termination of service or a later elected date. These units represent a right to receive one share of Wells Fargo common stock, and his total holdings of common stock units, including reinvested dividend equivalents, now stand at 17,851.9647. Chancy's direct common stock holdings, including shares from a dividend reinvestment program, amount to 28,540.387 shares.

feed.title: Highlights from Amgen's 2026 First Quarter Earnings Report
feed.summary: Amgen released its 2026 first quarter earnings report, showcasing strong business performance with 16 brands achieving double-digit growth. Chairman and CEO Robert A. Bradway expressed confidence in the company's long-term growth driven by new molecules in Phase 3 clinical development. The report highlighted Amgen's mission to serve patients by leveraging biology and technology to combat diseases.

feed.title: Apple Tops Sales Estimates After iPhone, Mac Help Fuel Growth
feed.summary: Apple Inc. surpassed analyst revenue estimates for its second quarter, largely driven by strong demand for iPhones and Macs. Despite exceeding projections, the results were not the "blowout" some investors had hoped for. The company reported a 17% revenue increase to $111.2 billion, beating the average estimate of $109.7 billion.

feed.title: Hershey Company (The) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $1.45 (NYSE:HSY)
feed.summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.45 per share, payable on June 15th to shareholders of record on May 15th. The company has a history of consistently raising its dividend, doing so for the past 15 consecutive years, and analysts expect future earnings to comfortably cover the dividend. Despite a recent stock dip, Hershey reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) Announces $0.86 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.864 per share, payable on July 3rd to shareholders of record on June 15th. This announcement follows a strong first quarter where the company significantly beat earnings and revenue estimates, causing its stock to rise by 9.7%. While the current payout ratio is high at 148.1%, analysts project future earnings will comfortably cover the dividend, with an expected payout ratio of 59.7% for the $3.45 annual dividend next year.

feed.title: DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE:DTM) to Issue $0.88 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE:DTM) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, payable on July 15th to shareholders of record on June 15th, representing a 2.4% annualized yield. The company recently reported Q1 EPS of $1.27, surpassing estimates, and provided FY2026 guidance. Following the announcement, DTM shares increased by 6.6%, trading at $147.96, and the company maintains a payout ratio of 73.3%.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) Declares Dividend Increase - $1.00 Per Share
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $1.00 per share, up 6.4% from its previous dividend. The industrial products company has consistently raised its dividend for 15 consecutive years, with an average annual increase of 0.1% over the last three years. Analysts expect the company to sufficiently cover its annual dividend with future earnings, supported by strong Q1 2026 results that beat consensus estimates.

feed.title: Escalade, Incorporated (NASDAQ:ESCA) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.15
feed.summary: Escalade, Incorporated (NASDAQ:ESCA) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1525 per share, payable on July 13th to shareholders of record on July 6th, representing a 3.3% dividend yield. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.32 EPS versus $0.18 expected and revenue of $55.79 million. Following this news, Escalade's shares rose 6.6% to $18.70, trading above recent moving averages.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corporation (NYSE:KIM) to Issue $0.26 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corporation (NYSE:KIM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on June 18th to shareholders of record on June 5th. The real estate investment trust has increased its dividend consistently over the past two years, although its current payout ratio of 140.5% indicates it is relying on its balance sheet to cover payments. Analysts expect future earnings to comfortably cover the dividend with a projected payout ratio of 55.0%.

feed.title: Stryker First-Quarter Sales, Profit Rise as it Dealt with Cyberattack
feed.summary: Stryker reported an increase in first-quarter profit and sales despite being affected by a cyberattack during the period. The medical-device company posted a profit of $745 million, up from $654 million a year ago, with sales rising 2.6% to $6.02 billion. However, this sales figure fell short of analyst expectations.

feed.title: PayPal (PYPL) unveils 3-unit reorg as two executive vice presidents depart
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is undergoing a strategic reorganization, transitioning to a simplified three-business operating model: Checkout Solutions & PayPal, Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, and Payment Services & Crypto. This restructuring aims to accelerate growth and streamline decision-making. As part of this change, EVP Michelle Gill and EVP Diego Scotti will depart, effective June 2, 2026.

feed.title: Elauwit Connection (ELWT) CFO granted 7,693 RSUs as equity award
feed.summary: Elauwit Connection, Inc. has granted its Chief Financial Officer, James P. Di Bartolo II, 7,693 restricted stock units (RSUs) under the company's 2025 Stock Incentive Plan. These RSUs convert into common shares on a one-for-one basis and generally vest on the first anniversary of the grant date. Following this award, Di Bartolo II directly holds 87,618 common stock shares in addition to the newly granted RSUs.

feed.title: DiamondRock Hospitality: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: DiamondRock Hospitality Co. (DRH) announced first-quarter earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, reporting funds from operations of $46.1 million, or 22 cents per share, against an average estimate of 19 cents. The real estate investment trust also exceeded revenue forecasts with $258.2 million for the period. For the full year, the company anticipates funds from operations to be in the range of $1.12 to $1.18 per share.

feed.title: [8-K] Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. (BSTT) has filed an 8-K report detailing its April 2026 monthly distributions. The company declared gross distributions of $0.0551 per share across all common stock classes, with net amounts varying due to stockholder servicing fees. These distributions are payable to stockholders of record on April 30, 2026, and are expected to be paid around May 20, 2026.

feed.title: Record $111.2B quarter and $100B buyback at Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL)
feed.summary: Apple Inc. reported a record-breaking fiscal second quarter with $111.2 billion in revenue, a 17% year-over-year increase, and diluted EPS of $2.01, up 22%. The company's board approved a 4% increase in the quarterly cash dividend to $0.27 per share and authorized an additional $100 billion share repurchase program. This strong performance was driven by record iPhone sales and all-time high Services revenue, reflecting broad-based growth across all geographic segments.

feed.title: Esquire Financial (NASDAQ: ESQ) declares $0.20 regular quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESQ) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share on its common stock. The dividend is payable on June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. This declaration continues the company's practice of returning cash to shareholders through regular distributions.

feed.title: Elauwit Connection (ELWT) CFO discloses direct holding of 87,618 common shares
feed.summary: Elauwit Connection, Inc. (ELWT) CFO James P. Di Bartolo II has disclosed an initial direct holding of 87,618 shares of Common Stock as of April 2, 2026, via a Form 3 filing. This filing serves to report initial insider ownership and does not reflect any new purchase or sale of shares. The document provides details of his direct ownership and role as Chief Financial Officer.

feed.title: Cytokinetics EVP Andrew Callos sells $948,900 in stock
feed.summary: Andrew Callos, EVP and Chief Commercial Officer at Cytokinetics, sold 15,000 shares of company stock for $948,900 after exercising non-qualified stock options. Following this transaction, Callos holds 58,555 direct shares and 54,000 unexercised derivative shares. This insider activity occurs as Cytokinetics, valued at $7.94 billion, is subject to varying analyst price targets and has recently announced new presentations focusing on its cardiac myosin inhibitor, MYQORZO.

feed.title: Snap-on Incorporated Declares Quarterly Dividend; Announces $500 Million Share Repurchase Authorization
feed.summary: Snap-on Incorporated announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $2.44 per share, payable on June 10, 2026. The company also authorized a new share repurchase program of up to $500 million, replacing an existing program. This move reaffirms Snap-on's commitment to shareholder value through capital return and strategic investments.

feed.title: Enova (ENVA) CEO sells 7,852 shares, keeps 122,945-share stake
feed.summary: Enova International CEO Steven E. Cunningham executed an exercise-and-sell transaction, exercising 3,696 non-qualified stock options and subsequently selling 7,852 shares of common stock at $175.50 per share. Following these transactions, Cunningham directly holds 122,945 shares of Enova common stock and retains 7,391 non-qualified stock options. The filing indicates a net sale of 7,852 shares totaling $1.38 million.

feed.title: Oil trader Delixy sold more barrels but swung to a $4.5M loss
feed.summary: Delixy Holdings (DLXY) reported a fiscal year 2025 net loss of $4.5 million, swinging from a $1.0 million net income in the prior year, despite a 13.9% increase in trading volume to 4,373 kBBLs. Revenue slightly decreased to $307.7 million, primarily due to lower market prices for fuel oil, while gross profit fell to $2.5 million from $4.3 million in fiscal year 2024. The loss was largely attributed to $4.9 million in consulting and advisory fees incurred at the holding company level as part of strategic efforts to diversify into LNG and LPG markets.

feed.title: Apple posts $111.2B in sales, approves another $100B buyback
feed.summary: Apple announced a record-breaking March quarter for fiscal year 2026, with total revenue reaching $111.2 billion, a 17 percent increase year-over-year, and diluted earnings per share of $2.01, up 22 percent. The company also declared a cash dividend of $0.27 per share, a 4 percent increase, and authorized an additional $100 billion share repurchase program. This strong financial performance was driven by extraordinary demand for the iPhone 17 lineup and record Services revenue.
